headline: Travel Headwinds Result In Attractive Valuation For Global Payments (GPN) Stocks
summary: Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN) is one of the Top 10 Extreme Value Stocks To Buy Now. On June 22, Jason Kupferberg of Wells Fargo reiterated a Buy rating on Global Payments Inc. (NYSE:GPN) along with the price target of $105. The firm’s price target implies a further 33% upside from current levels. The travel headwinds […]
